steps: Go to https://developers.facebook.com and log in with your Facebook account
If not already a developer, click 'Get Started' and complete the developer registration
Click 'My Apps' in the top-right, then click 'Create App'
Select an app type (choose 'Business' for Pages/Graph API access, or 'Consumer' for user data)
Enter an app name and contact email, then click 'Create app'
On the app dashboard, go to 'App settings' > 'Basic' in the left sidebar
Copy the 'App ID' (Client ID) and click 'Show' next to App Secret to reveal and copy the Client Secret
Add the required products to your app (e.g. 'Facebook Login') from the dashboard
Under Facebook Login > Settings, add valid OAuth redirect URIs
To go live, switch the app from Development to Live mode and complete any required permissions review

credential_fields.name: client_id
credential_fields.label: App ID (Client ID)
credential_fields.description: Your Facebook App ID, found in App Settings > Basic

credential_fields.name: client_secret
credential_fields.label: App Secret (Client Secret)
credential_fields.description: Your Facebook App Secret, found in App Settings > Basic

notes: Free to create and use; no charges for basic API access
New apps start in Development mode — only app admins/testers can use them until the app is made Live
Permissions like pages_manage_posts require App Review if used by non-admins
Page access tokens (separate from user tokens) are required for most Page management operations

test_endpoint.description: Returns the authenticated user's ID and name
